ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-12-2013 IN 503, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO MAINTAIN THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE WITH PREFERENCE. HEARING HELD. THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO MAINTAIN THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE WITH PREFERENCE IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DISCOVERY IS CLOSED. THE COURT WILL SET THIS CASE ON AN EXPEDITED TRIAL DATE JULY 1, 2013. THE DEFENDANTS ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER ON ALL MOTIONS IN LIMINE AND PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A PARED DOWN LIST BY JUNE 27. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE AN ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON, REPORTER: KIMBERLY R. HENDERSHOTT OF AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12552

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Maintaining Current Trial Date With Preference
Off Calendar Jun-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jennifer L. Alesio of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / moving party James Harkin
Laura Przetak of BERRY & BERRY (510-250-0200), designated defense counsel
Shelley K. Tinkoff of BRYDON HUGO & PARKER (415-808-0300), appearing for defendant / opposing party Foster Wheeler LLC
Robert L. Nelder of HASSARD BONNINGTON LLP (415-288-9800), appearing for defendant Sequoia Ventures Inc.

RULING:
PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO MAINTAIN THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE WITH PREFERENCE

Hearing held. The Court ruled as follows: Plaintiff's motion to maintain the current trial date with preference is denied without prejudice. Discovery is closed. The Court will set this case on an expedited trial date July 1, 2013. The defendants are ordered to meet and confer on all motions in limine and provide the Court with a pared down list by June 27. Counsel for plaintiff to prepare an order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Kimberly R. Hendershott of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12552 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
